options.name: --Find
options.description:
Text to search.
If Mode is undefined: regular expression syntax, with case insensitive.
If Mode=Json: Find is the JSON key and Replace is the value to set.

options.name: --Base
options.description: Base directory to start file searchs. Default is current folder.

options.name: --Pattern
options.description:
List of files to include in the search. Default is *.*.
Using the Minimatch syntax (**/*.config search in all sub-folders).

options.name: --Demo
options.description: Run the tool in Preview mode (without update files).

options.name: --Mode
options.description:
Execution mode of the tool.
By default, undefined.
JSon, find the key to replace by his value.
